entry.title: New IDC VA79113D0054 awarded to TRIWEST HEALTHCARE ALLIANCE CORP. for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::CT::IGF PATIENT CENTERED COMMUNITY CARE (PCCC) THE REQUIREMENT IS AN EFFORT TO CREATE CENTRALLY SUPPORTED HEALTHCARE CONTRACTS (TO INCLUDE ALL MEDICAL AND SURGICAL SERVICES ALONG WITH SKILLED HOME HEALTH) ON A NATIONAL BASIS IN ALL VETERAN INTEGRATED SERVICE NETWORKS (VISNS). THE GOAL IS TO PROVIDE VETERANS COORDINATED, TIMELY ACCESS TO HIGH QUALITY CARE FROM A COMPREHENSIVE NETWORK OF VA AND NON-VA PROVIDERS TO SUPPLEMENT VA CARE WHERE IT IS NOT AVAILABLE.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OFFICES OF PHYSICIANS (EXCEPT MENTAL HEALTH SPECIALISTS)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC VA79113D0054 (P00003) awarded to TRIWEST HEALTHCARE ALLIANCE CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::CT::IGF PATIENT CENTERED COMMUNITY CARE (PCCC) THE REQUIREMENT IS AN EFFORT TO ADD PRIMARY CARE TO THE CENTRALLY SUPPORTED HEALTHCARE CONTRACTS (TO INCLUDE ALL MEDICAL AND SURGICAL SERVICES ALONG WITH SKILLED HOME HEALTH) ON A NATIONAL BASIS IN ALL VETERAN INTEGRATED SERVICE NETWORKS (VISNS). THE GOAL IS TO PROVIDE VETERANS COORDINATED, TIMELY ACCESS TO HIGH QUALITY CARE FROM A COMPREHENSIVE NETWORK OF VA AND NON-VA PROVIDERS TO SUPPLEMENT VA CARE WHERE IT IS NOT AVAILABLE.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OFFICES OF PHYSICIANS (EXCEPT MENTAL HEALTH SPECIALISTS)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
